questions.title: 오사카 근교 관광지 탐색
questions.cypher: MATCH (osa:City {_id:'OSA'})-[:NEAR_CITY|OFTEN_COTRAVELED]-(c:City) MATCH (c)<-[:ATTRACTION_IN_CITY]-(a:Attraction) RETURN c._id AS city, collect(DISTINCT a._id)[..5] AS topAttractions

questions.title: 오사카+교토 둘 다 방문 상품
questions.naturalLanguage: 오사카와 교토 둘 다 방문하는 상품
questions.cypher: MATCH (sp:SaleProduct)-[:ARRIVES_IN]->(:City {_id:'OSA'}) MATCH (sp)-[:VISITS_CITY]->(:City {_id:'OSA'}) MATCH (sp)-[:VISITS_CITY]->(:City {_id:'UKY'}) RETURN sp._id AS code

questions.title: 특정 상품 숙박 호텔 (JOP1302603307CS)
questions.cypher: MATCH (sp:SaleProduct {_id:'JOP1302603307CS'})-[:HAS_HOTEL_STAY]->(hs:HotelStay) OPTIONAL MATCH (hs)-[:MATCHED_TO]->(h:Hotel) RETURN hs.schdDay AS day, hs.htlKoNm AS hotel, h._id AS hotelId ORDER BY day

questions.title: 관광지 방문 순서 분포 (도톤보리)
questions.cypher: MATCH (a:Attraction)<-[r:HAS_SCHEDULED_ATTRACTION]-() WHERE a.landmarkNameKo CONTAINS '도톤보리' RETURN r.schdDay AS day, r.visitOrder AS ord, count(*) AS freq ORDER BY day, ord

questions.title: reference 기반 유사 상품군
questions.naturalLanguage: 특정 reference_product_id와 같은 템플릿의 다른 출발상품들
questions.cypher: MATCH (rp:RepresentativeProduct {_id:'MJO1008'})<-[:INSTANCE_OF]-(sp:SaleProduct) RETURN sp._id AS code, sp.saleProdNm AS name

questions.title: 대표상품 내 일정 변형 diff
questions.naturalLanguage: MJO1008 아래 SaleProduct 각각의 Attraction 집합
questions.cypher: MATCH (rp:RepresentativeProduct {_id:'MJO1008'})<-[:INSTANCE_OF]-(sp:SaleProduct)-[:HAS_SCHEDULED_ATTRACTION]->(a:Attraction) RETURN sp._id AS code, collect(DISTINCT a.landmarkNameKo) AS attractions

questions.title: 공동방문 상위 관광지 (오사카성)
questions.naturalLanguage: 오사카성과 같은 상품에 자주 등장하는 관광지
questions.cypher: MATCH (a:Attraction)-[r:CO_VISITED]-(b:Attraction) WHERE a.landmarkNameKo CONTAINS '오사카성' RETURN b.landmarkNameKo AS name, r.support AS support ORDER BY support DESC LIMIT 5

questions.title: 관광지 시간대 분포 (기요미즈데라)
questions.cypher: MATCH (a:Attraction {_id:'LJP00236937'})<-[r:HAS_SCHEDULED_ATTRACTION]-() RETURN r.visitOrder AS ord, count(*) AS cnt ORDER BY ord

questions.title: 로맨틱 + 근교 관광지
questions.cypher: MATCH (osa:City {_id:'OSA'})-[:NEAR_CITY|OFTEN_COTRAVELED]-(c:City) WITH collect(DISTINCT c) + [osa] AS scope UNWIND scope AS c MATCH (c)<-[:ATTRACTION_IN_CITY]-(a:Attraction)-[:HAS_MOOD]->(:Mood {_id:'ROMANTIC'}) RETURN DISTINCT a.landmarkNameKo AS name, c.cityName AS city

questions.title: 특정 호텔 쓰는 다른 상품
questions.cypher: MATCH (h:Hotel)<-[:MATCHED_TO]-(hs:HotelStay)<-[:HAS_HOTEL_STAY]-(sp:SaleProduct) WHERE h.name CONTAINS '플라자 고베' RETURN DISTINCT sp._id AS code, sp.saleProdNm AS name

questions.title: 간사이공항 귀국 + 교토 일정
questions.naturalLanguage: KIX에서 귀국하며 교토 일정 포함 상품
questions.cypher: MATCH (sp:SaleProduct)-[:HAS_FLIGHT_SEGMENT]->(fs:FlightSegment) WHERE fs.segReq = 2 MATCH (fs)-[:DEPARTS_FROM]->(:Airport {_id:'KIX'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (sp)-[:HAS_SCHEDULED_ATTRACTION]->(a:Attraction)-[:ATTRACTION_IN_CITY]->(:City {_id:'UKY'}) WITH sp, count(DISTINCT a) AS kyotoCnt WHERE kyotoCnt >= 1 RETURN sp._id AS code, kyotoCnt

questions.title: 3관광지 같은 일차 조합
questions.naturalLanguage: 오사카성과 도톤보리가 같은 일차에 함께 등장하는 상품
questions.cypher: MATCH (sp:SaleProduct)-[r1:HAS_SCHEDULED_ATTRACTION]->(a:Attraction) WHERE a.landmarkNameKo CONTAINS '오사카성' MATCH (sp)-[r2:HAS_SCHEDULED_ATTRACTION]->(b:Attraction) WHERE b.landmarkNameKo CONTAINS '도톤보리' AND r1.schdDay = r2.schdDay RETURN sp._id AS code, r1.schdDay AS day

questions.title: 신상품 (3관광지 포함 4박5일 오사카 도착)
questions.naturalLanguage: 아라시야마/후시미/청수사 포함 4박5일 오사카 도착 상품 존재 여부
questions.cypher: MATCH (sp:SaleProduct)-[:ARRIVES_IN]->(:City {_id:'OSA'}) WHERE sp.trvlNgtCnt >= 3 MATCH (sp)-[:HAS_SCHEDULED_ATTRACTION]->(a:Attraction) WHERE a.landmarkNameKo IN ['아라시야마','후시미이나리','기요미즈데라'] WITH sp, collect(DISTINCT a.landmarkNameKo) AS matched WHERE size(matched) >= 2 RETURN sp._id AS code, matched

questions.title: 복합 제약 (3박4일 + 테마 + 호텔 등급)
questions.cypher: MATCH (sp:SaleProduct)-[:ARRIVES_IN]->(:City {_id:'OSA'}) WHERE sp.trvlNgtCnt = 3 AND sp.trvlDayCnt = 4 MATCH (sp)-[:HAS_HOTEL_STAY]->(:HotelStay)-[:MATCHED_TO]->(h:Hotel) WITH sp, collect(DISTINCT h) AS hotels WHERE size(hotels) > 0 RETURN sp._id AS code, [x IN hotels | x.name] AS hotels

questions.title: 벚꽃시즌 관광지 포함 상품
questions.naturalLanguage: 벚꽃시즌 태그 관광지를 포함한 오사카 도착 상품
questions.cypher: MATCH (sp:SaleProduct)-[:ARRIVES_IN]->(:City {_id:'OSA'}) MATCH (sp)-[:HAS_SCHEDULED_ATTRACTION]->(a:Attraction)-[:HAS_SEASONALITY]->(:Season {_id:'CHERRY_BLOSSOM'}) RETURN DISTINCT sp._id AS code, sp.saleProdNm AS name LIMIT 20

questions.title: 트렌드 기반 대체 관광지 탐색
questions.naturalLanguage: 특정 관광지와 같이 자주 가는 곳 중 지리적으로 인접한 대체지
questions.cypher: MATCH (a:Attraction {landmarkNameKo:'오사카성 공원'})-[r:CO_VISITED]-(b:Attraction) MATCH (b)-[:ATTRACTION_IN_CITY]->(c:City) RETURN DISTINCT b.landmarkNameKo AS name, c.cityName AS city, r.support AS support ORDER BY r.support DESC LIMIT 8
